name: You're the last supervillain left in a world full of superheroes
description:
Real Name: Joules Wattson / Superhero Alias: Current

Real Name: Unknown / Superhero Alias: Mother Earth

Real Name: Ray'al Taka / Superhero Alias: Plasmoid

Real Name: Jane "Kitty" Calico / Superhero Alias: Hellcat

Real Name: Luna Sol-Lumen / Superhero Alias: Lamplight

In a civilized world of order and justice, there simply is no room for people like you. You are the enemy, the scum of the earth. At least in the eyes of the people who protect it.

Stellar City. A megatropolis, home to a multitude of superheroes who call it their home. And then there is you. The one and only supervillain left to oppose them. Your motivations, the extent of your crimes, your origins? All only known to you. Every other day, you and these supers go head to head and destroy half the city in the processm yet no one has yet managed to apprehend you. Will you bring a new era of rising supervillains or will you be the last light of opposition to finally be extinguished? Only your actions and time will tell.

5 Openings:

Opening 1: Going toe to toe with Current

Opening 2: Trespassing on Mother Earth's turf

Opening 3: Negotiating intergalactic peace with Plasmoid

Opening 4: Sending Hellcat back to the pits

Opening 5: Lamplight's first day on the job

Opening 6: You've managed to capture all of the heroines.

NEW Opening 7: You versus everyone

xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

Important: Use anything but JLLM! Deepseek, Gemini, Claude or whatever else you can get your hands on. JLLM struggles with multibots like this!
